title: Jicklus x Fresh animations
description: A Resource Pack that makes Jicklus compatible with Fresh Animations.
body:
This is the first Texture Pack I have made, I have done it with a lot of dedication and love.
I do not own the rights to the original packs.

Jicklus: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jicklus

Fresh Animations: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations
